---
title: "HC"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Hierarchical Clustering Analysis

```{r hc-setup}
# Set Seed for Reproducibility:
set.seed(2026)

# Specify the Maximum Sample Size for Hierarchical Clustering:
# Hierarchical clustering is computationally expensive for large datasets because it
# requires a full pairwise distance matrix. A reproducible sample is therefore used.
hc_sample_size <- min(3000, nrow(airbnb_model_data))

# Create a Reproducible Sample of the Model-Ready Dataset:
hc_sample_index <- sample(seq_len(nrow(airbnb_model_data)), size = hc_sample_size)

airbnb_hc_data <- airbnb_model_data |>
  slice(hc_sample_index)

# Check Dimensions of the Hierarchical Clustering Dataset:
hc_data_overview <- tibble(
  Dataset = "Hierarchical clustering sample",
  Observations = nrow(airbnb_hc_data),
  Variables = ncol(airbnb_hc_data)
)

# Output HC Dataset Overview Table:
hc_data_overview_latex <- hc_data_overview |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Dataset Used for Hierarchical Clustering",
    align = c("l", "r", "r"),
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_data_overview_latex)
```


```{r hc-distance-matrix}
# Compute Euclidean Distance Matrix:
hc_dist <- dist(
  airbnb_hc_data,
  method = "euclidean"
)
```



```{r hc-method-comparison}
if (file.exists("HCMethodComparison.RData")) {
  load("HCMethodComparison.RData")
} else {
  # Compare Hierarchical Clustering Linkage Methods:
  hc_methods <- c("single", "complete", "average", "ward")
  
  # Calculate Agglomerative Coefficients for Each Method:
  hc_method_comparison <- map_dfr(
    hc_methods,
    \(method_name) {
      agnes_fit <- cluster::agnes(
        airbnb_hc_data,
        method = method_name,
        metric = "euclidean"
      )
      
      tibble(
        Method = str_to_title(method_name),
        Agglomerative_Coefficient = round(agnes_fit$ac, 3)
      )
    }
  )
  
  save(hc_method_comparison, file = "HCMethodComparison.RData")
}

# Output Linkage Method Comparison Table:
hc_method_comparison_latex <- hc_method_comparison |>
  arrange(desc(Agglomerative_Coefficient)) |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Comparison of Hierarchical Clustering Linkage Methods",
    align = c("l", "r"),
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_method_comparison_latex)
```


```{r hc-ward-model}
# Fit Hierarchical Clustering Model using Ward's Method:
hc_ward <- hclust(
  hc_dist,
  method = "ward.D2"
)
```



```{r hc-dendrogram, fig.cap="Dendrogram from Ward hierarchical clustering on the Airbnb modelling sample."}
# Plot Dendrogram:
plot(
  hc_ward,
  labels = FALSE,
  hang = -1,
  main = "Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram",
  xlab = "Airbnb Listings",
  ylab = "Height"
)
```


```{r hc-silhouette-analysis}
# Evaluate Candidate Numbers of Clusters using Average Silhouette Width:
candidate_k <- 2:8

hc_silhouette_summary <- map_dfr(
  candidate_k,
  \(k) {
    cluster_assignments <- cutree(hc_ward, k = k)
    
    sil <- cluster::silhouette(
      cluster_assignments,
      hc_dist
    )
    
    tibble(
      Clusters = k,
      Average_Silhouette_Width = round(mean(sil[, "sil_width"]), 3)
    )
  }
)

# Output Silhouette Summary Table:
hc_silhouette_latex <- hc_silhouette_summary |>
  arrange(desc(Average_Silhouette_Width)) |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Hierarchical Clustering Silhouette Analysis",
    align = c("r", "r"),
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_silhouette_latex)

# Select the Number of Clusters with the Highest Average Silhouette Width:
hc_best_k <- hc_silhouette_summary |>
  slice_max(Average_Silhouette_Width, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  pull(Clusters)
```


```{r hc-silhouette-plot, fig.cap="Average silhouette width for candidate hierarchical clustering solutions."}
# Plot Average Silhouette Width by Number of Clusters:
hc_silhouette_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Clusters, y = Average_Silhouette_Width)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = candidate_k) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Clusters",
    y = "Average Silhouette Width",
    title = "Hierarchical Clustering: Silhouette-Based Choice of k"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r hc-final-clusters}
# Cut the Dendrogram to Obtain the Final Hierarchical Clusters:
hc_cluster_assignments <- cutree(
  hc_ward,
  k = hc_best_k
)

# Add Cluster Assignments to the Sampled Modelling Dataset:
airbnb_hc_clustered <- airbnb_hc_data |>
  mutate(
    HC_Cluster = factor(hc_cluster_assignments)
  )

# Create Cluster Size Table:
hc_cluster_sizes <- airbnb_hc_clustered |>
  count(HC_Cluster, name = "N_Listings") |>
  mutate(
    Percentage = percent(N_Listings / sum(N_Listings), accuracy = 0.1)
  )

# Output Cluster Size Table:
hc_cluster_sizes_latex <- hc_cluster_sizes |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Hierarchical Clustering Cluster Sizes",
    align = c("l", "r", "r"),
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_cluster_sizes_latex)
```



```{r hc-cluster-profile-standardised}
# Profile Clusters using the Standardised Modelling Variables:
hc_cluster_profile <- airbnb_hc_clustered |>
  group_by(HC_Cluster) |>
  summarise(
    across(
      where(is.numeric),
      ~round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Output Cluster Profile Table:
hc_cluster_profile_latex <- hc_cluster_profile |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Hierarchical Clustering Profile Based on Standardised Modelling Variables",
    align = "r",
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_cluster_profile_latex)
```


```{r hc-cluster-profile-readable}
# Create a More Interpretable Cluster Profile using the Original Retained Variables:
airbnb_hc_readable <- airbnb_reduced |>
  slice(hc_sample_index) |>
  mutate(
    HC_Cluster = factor(hc_cluster_assignments)
  )

# Summarise Main Numeric Variables by Cluster:
hc_readable_numeric_profile <- airbnb_hc_readable |>
  group_by(HC_Cluster) |>
  summarise(
    Listings = n(),
    Mean_Price = round(mean(price, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
    Median_Price = round(median(price, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
    Mean_Accommodates = round(mean(accommodates, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_Availability_365 = round(mean(availability_365, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    Mean_Number_of_Reviews = round(mean(number_of_reviews, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    Mean_Review_Rating = round(mean(review_scores_rating, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_Host_Listings_Count = round(mean(host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Output Interpretable Numeric Cluster Profile:
hc_readable_numeric_latex <- hc_readable_numeric_profile |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Interpretable Numeric Profile of Hierarchical Clusters",
    align = "r",
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_readable_numeric_latex)
```


```{r hc-cluster-category-profile}
# Identify the Most Common Neighbourhood and Property Type per Cluster:
hc_readable_category_profile <- airbnb_hc_readable |>
  group_by(HC_Cluster) |>
  summarise(
    Most_Common_Neighbourhood = names(sort(table(neighbourhood_cleansed), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
    Most_Common_Property_Type = names(sort(table(property_type_proper_trim), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Output Categorical Cluster Profile:
hc_readable_category_latex <- hc_readable_category_profile |>
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Dominant Categorical Characteristics of Hierarchical Clusters",
    align = c("l", "l", "l"),
    escape = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

cat(hc_readable_category_latex)
```


```{r hc-cluster-pca-plot, fig.cap="Two-dimensional PCA visualisation of the hierarchical clustering solution."}
# Create PCA Projection for Visualising Hierarchical Clusters:
hc_pca <- prcomp(
  airbnb_hc_data,
  center = FALSE,
  scale. = FALSE
)

hc_pca_plot_data <- as_tibble(hc_pca$x[, 1:2]) |>
  mutate(
    HC_Cluster = factor(hc_cluster_assignments)
  )

# Plot the First Two Principal Components Coloured by HC Cluster:
hc_pca_plot_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = HC_Cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Principal Component 1",
    y = "Principal Component 2",
    colour = "HC Cluster",
    title = "PCA Visualisation of Hierarchical Clusters"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r hc-save-results}
# Save Final Hierarchical Clustering Outputs for Later Comparison:
hc_results <- list(
  data = airbnb_hc_data,
  distance_matrix = hc_dist,
  model = hc_ward,
  best_k = hc_best_k,
  clusters = hc_cluster_assignments,
  clustered_data = airbnb_hc_clustered,
  readable_clustered_data = airbnb_hc_readable,
  silhouette_summary = hc_silhouette_summary,
  cluster_sizes = hc_cluster_sizes,
  numeric_profile = hc_readable_numeric_profile,
  category_profile = hc_readable_category_profile
)
```
